# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-PRV-045](task-0112): Provider Data Encryption

## Purpose

Implement provider data encryption.

## Scope

- Encryption algorithm
- Key management
- Data protection

## Implementation

1. Define algorithm
2. Manage keys
3. Protect data

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Algorithm defined
2. Keys managed
3. Data protected
